message:
style(sync): improve mutex iterator chain formatting

Break long iterator chains across multiple lines for better readability:

- `state.waiters.iter_mut().find(...)` now spans multiple lines
- Applied consistently in both LockFuture and OwnedLockFuture poll methods
- No functional changes, purely formatting improvement

This aligns with the project's style of breaking method chains when they
exceed comfortable line lengths, making the waker update logic easier to
follow at a glance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
